instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall hold the current gear during uphill driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prevent upshift when Hill_Gradient exceeds threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall hold gear during downhill driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prevent upshift when downhill gradient exceeds limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall hold gear during aggressive acceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when throttle position exceeds threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable gear hold in sport mode.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall release gear hold when Vehicle_Speed exceeds configured limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable gear hold when System_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall release gear hold when engine speed exceeds limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.
